reasoning: The control 'Protection Against Malware' can be mapped to Kubernetes by focusing on image security and pod security. Image vulnerability scanning ensures that container images are free from known vulnerabilities, which is a direct measure against malware. Admission controllers can enforce security policies that prevent the deployment of potentially harmful or non-compliant pods. Ensuring that pods do not run as root is a critical security measure to prevent privilege escalation, which can be exploited by malware. Scanning images on admission ensures that only secure and compliant images are deployed.
title: Protection Against Malware
